There will be no change" was

der to that effect"


The question will come up before
the city council at the meeting
next Tuesday night. and there ac-

Councilmen Gray, Nelson, Lam
bert, Mohr and Cartwright are in

Councilman Shaefer favors day
work because of the city's expert
ence in other projects done by con-
tract, for example. the Sprague ave
